title: Visa’s Argentina Deals Expand Processing Reach And Undervaluation Story
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has entered into definitive agreements to acquire Prisma Medios de Pago and Newpay in Argentina. The deals expand Visa's credit, debit, and prepaid card processing capabilities and payment infrastructure in Latin America. The agreements focus on deepening Visa's presence in the regional payments market. Visa operates at the center of global electronic payments, connecting consumers, merchants, and financial institutions. Latin America has been a focus area for digital payment...
